Bug / Task Description: Histogram.CumulativeBelow in internal/histogram/histogram.go returns the number of observations at or below a given bound by summing buckets whose inclusive upper bound is within range. It currently under-counts by one bucket whenever the queried value coincides with a bucket boundary: a cumulative query landing exactly on a configured bound drops the matching bucket's contribution. Per-bucket counts and totals are unaffected, so only cumulative/percentile readouts are wrong.
